theme_strategy: Light mode default for marketing/e-commerce to evoke purity and cleanliness. Dark mode strictly for the Admin Dashboard sidebar to create a command-center feel.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) to elevate the font from feeling generic to looking editorial and premium.

styles.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900 leading-tight

body.usage: Highly readable, structural font. Use for all data, descriptions, and functional UI.

buttons.styles: text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase or Title Case based on context

primary.description: Deep Blue - Evokes trust, authority, and deep water.

secondary.description: Sky Blue - Evokes freshness, hydration, and clarity.

accent.description: Emerald Green - Health, natural purification, 'Ayurita' roots.

background.description: Off-white background for reduced eye strain.

border_radius.buttons: rounded-full for primary actions, rounded-xl for secondary

layout_patterns.spacing_strategy: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections. Cards need p-8 minimum.
layout_patterns.hero: Asymmetric split or full-screen with immersive image overlay. Overlay MUST NOT exceed bg-black/40. Use dramatic typography.
layout_patterns.bento_grid: For 'Features' and 'Quality Assurance', use an asymmetrical grid (e.g. one large card spanning 2 rows, surrounded by smaller metric cards).
layout_patterns.admin_dashboard: Sidebar (w-64) with fixed position. Content area with soft gray background (bg-slate-50). High-density metric cards (grid-cols-4).
layout_patterns.ecommerce_sidebar: Left sidebar (w-72) for filters (categories, size). Right area for product grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with large imagery.
layout_patterns.card_design: Clean white cards (rounded-2xl) with soft shadows. Image at top (max-h-64 object-cover), padded content area below. Do not use generic borders if shadow is present.

motion.philosophy: Fluid like water. Smooth, easing transitions.

animations.image_zoom: overflow-hidden. Image gets hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-in-out

hero_background.description: A water droplet falling into rippling water surface, establishing extreme purity and clarity.
hero_background.usage: Main Hero Section background with bg-black/30 overlay.

hero_alternative.description: Water droplets falling into dark, rippling water.
hero_alternative.usage: Can be used for secondary hero or CTA banner backgrounds.

products_bottle_1.description: Clear drinking bottle filled with water.

products_bottle_2.description: Black bottle beside clear drinking glass.
products_bottle_2.usage: Product representation for corporate/premium custom branding.

industry_hospitality.description: Elegant table setting with floral centerpiece.
industry_hospitality.usage: Industries section representing Hotels, Restaurants, and Events.

industry_corporate.usage: Industries section representing Corporate Offices and Marriage Halls.

icons.usage: Use crisp, thin icons. Avoid heavy filled icons. Wrap icons in rounded-full containers with subtle primary color background (e.g. bg-blue-50 text-primary) for visual pop.

testing_attributes.conventions: Kebab-case, role-based. Every interactive element requires a data-testid.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: NEVER create generic centered 'slop' layouts. Use asymmetric, overlapping bento grids for interest.
Use 2x-3x more padding than usual (e.g., py-24). Allow the white space to emphasize the premium nature of the brand.
Do not use generic 'inter' for headings. Strictly use Poppins Bold with tracking-tight.
Implement glassmorphism correctly: high blur (backdrop-blur-xl), slight white/dark tint, 1px subtle inner border.
Never use purely transparent header or overlays that sit over content without a blur.
Admin dashboard must use a dark theme for the sidebar (#0F172A) to contrast sharply with the light content area.
Add micro-interactions (hover lift, image zoom) to all cards and buttons.
Use Lucide-react for all icons, keeping stroke-width thin (1.5) for elegance.
Products page requires a robust e-commerce filter layout (sidebar + grid).
Forms must use Shadcn components but styled seamlessly with rounded-xl inputs and ample padding.

components_to_use.cards: Clean white background, 16px border-radius, soft drop shadow, border-none unless explicitly needed for contrast.
components_to_use.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions, rounded-xl for secondary. Must have hover states (opacity change, or slight lift).
